textByHash.159233e30ff1ee2a0e419113fbb1c11fd2674047: Our purpose, as taught to us by the Tasakaal, is to keep this balance, no matter the cost.
textByHash.28a15bbe422a55e196f0a10194561043b50a790a: I am Xorrah quo Sihar. I am one of the mystics of the Kahlith.
textByHash.3d92b16f903d314aa1fedaf5e0f7c05e276eaaf6: Yes. All Kahlith serve the balance. To do this, we take on one of four roles.
textByHash.491d772e8870df5ba9a41bf0ce578bcd18b5b968: Well you'll find our language is quite a simple one. Our names are a good example of how it is used.
textByHash.4de00bc2ad59aee7bc345df46440478d107b3214: For every death, there must be life. For every life, there must be a death. This is the balance.
textByHash.682d4d19d6c22d7dfc14721129ef924fa840ceb9: In the past, we have tried to teach our language to your kind. However, despite the simplicity of our tongue, success was limited.
textByHash.785f7771871243177d84ecb98d8fc04a02a3e072: Yes. At one time we were like you, but then we met the Tasakaal. They taught us to have purpose. They taught us to serve the balance.
textByHash.7b369a727ba3d253f74c2b421d8f1adf5bbb5e3d: The second word, 'quo', is a basic Kahlith word that translates to 'the' in your language.
textByHash.89f3822317f2d345f8cd0c75bd03eeaff9caf563: Our teachers. They showed us the way and taught us to serve the balance.
textByHash.96e277a24a5bd55f77acad357c6c88d63e20bcce: We find that it is easier to just use your language when your kind are around.
textByHash.a0f5c9a1d0a99182fa8cde6d0951cd04d11c81b5: My role is that of a mystic. I learn from the Tasakaal and then pass on their teachings.
textByHash.a793716fb2e2f7c7caf37ae948085f1c56f5a829: I am Xorrah quo Sihar. The first word, 'Xorrah', is unique to me and it is how I can be identified.
textByHash.be339d02b2324ca5484612ba55dc849919e8e5bf: Greetings human. Do you seek guidance?
textByHash.bf45490be7c86222a198952f2c363948cd919021: Our old lives were left behind. In their place, the Kahlith were born.
textByHash.c97d160e8cdd96b19df3a27abc98326fa2f5eef1: This is our home. In your tongue, it is known as Mount Karuulm.
textByHash.d69370a8943856e8d459a9aed070e8c50d293615: The final word, 'Sihar', is my title. There are four possible titles, one for each role in Kahlith society. My title translates to 'Mystic' in your tongue.
textByHash.f6fd46e9bf17c33797620b3009788f68064cec5a: Yes. You speak the language of humans but we Kahlith have our own language.
